projectDescription: A React application that lets users discover, explore, and save their favorite meals using TheMealDB API.
keyFeatures: Search recipes by name via TheMealDB API
Random meal discovery on initial load
Dynamic recipe detail pages with ingredients and instructions
YouTube video playback for recipes via React Player
Add and remove favorites with localStorage persistence
Dark modern UI with fully responsive design
Optimized state management with custom hooks
Client-side routing with React Router DOM
publicApiSurface: getRecipeById(id) - Fetch full recipe details by ID
useRecipes() - Custom hook for recipe search/random state
useRecipeDetail() - Custom hook for single recipe state
FavoriteProvider - Context provider for favorites state
